calendarFaqs.q: Does Long Beach Unified School District have a fall break in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Yes. Long Beach Unified School District has a fall break running from Nov 23, 2026 to Nov 27, 2026, a total of 5 days.

calendarFaqs.q: When does school start for Long Beach Unified School District in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school for Long Beach Unified School District is Tuesday, August 25, 2026. Students and staff are expected to report on this date to begin the new academic year.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Long Beach Unified School District in 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school for Long Beach Unified School District is Thursday, June 10, 2027. The school year runs from August through June, covering 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When is winter break 2026-2027 for Long Beach Unified School District?
calendarFaqs.a: Winter break for Long Beach Unified School District runs Dec 21, 2026–Jan 1, 2027, 12 days. School resumes Jan 4, 2027.

yearNumbers.label: Fall Break Retained
yearNumbers.detail: LBUSD continues its Fall Break structure rather than a Thanksgiving holiday — same as 2025-2026, an ongoing distinctive feature of the district calendar.

yearNumbers.label: Lincoln's Day
yearNumbers.detail: Lincoln's Birthday is observed as a separate school holiday on February 8 — one week before Presidents' Day on Feb 15, giving February two holiday Mondays in a row.

yearNumbers.label: Late Spring Break
yearNumbers.detail: Spring Break falls in the first week of April — two weeks after LAUSD's March 22-26 spring break, with misaligned calendars for families spanning both districts.

calendarNotes: Long Beach Unified begins the 2026–2027 school year on August 25, 2026, about two weeks later than LAUSD. Spring Break runs April 5–9, 2027, and the last day of school is June 10, 2027. CAMS and Sato Academy start on August 12 — two weeks ahead of the main district calendar — so students at those schools follow a meaningfully different schedule than most LBUSD campuses.
